description: From the manufacturer About Us In 1919 It begins with their founder Bert Draper and his wife Emily. In 1920 they start delivering tools, The business grows. In 1940 they’re thriving in Kingston upon Thames with an established HQ and busy trade counter. In 1950 Demand increases and they continue to deliver. In 1960 People love their commitment to quality and their fleet grows. In 1961 Yuri Gagarin orbits the Earth. And they launch their first catalogue. In 2011 they become Official Tool Partner to Santa Pod Raceway. In 2019 their support for the automotive industry continues with sponsorship of BTCC team Excelr8 Motorsport.
